description: Role energy priorities for the Moss concept. Higher tiers are allowed stronger separation and clearer personality.

A_primaryRecognizers.intent: Immediate landmarks that should stand out first in active coding.

keyword.notes: Fast control-flow recognition. Hotter and more immediate than Hearth.

function.notes: Primary cool anchor. One of the fastest-recognized roles on the page.

type.notes: Sharp classification lane with strong separation from keyword and function.

B_rhythmicSupport.intent: Lively but subordinate roles that keep code movement readable.

string.notes: Fresh and scan-friendly, but must not outrun primary recognizers.

number.notes: Punchier than Hearth for quick numeric spotting.

property.notes: Clear enough to support structure without flooding the page.

method.notes: Energetic secondary warmth, subordinate to function.

C_pageStability.intent: Roles that keep the page coherent and prevent the palette from becoming noisy.

comment.notes: Quiet guidance. Must stay out of the energy race.

operator.notes: Readable connective tissue with restrained presence.

variable.notes: Carrier role that preserves neutral breathing room.

parameter.notes: Near-carrier role with enough distinction for active editing.
